channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Captain America: Brave New World: release date, trailer, confirmed cast, plot synopsis, and more news and rumors on the Marvel Phase 5 movie
item.description: Captain America: Brave new World will be the penultimate Marvel Phase 5 movie – here's everything you need to know.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: The Future of Artificial Intelligence: Top Stories from the Industry
item.description: The latest developments in artificial intelligence, including OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's plans, Meta's $10 billion data center, and AI-powered bias meters
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How 2025’s digital products will evolve
item.description: When most people hear “TikTok features,” there’s usually some eye-rolling involved. But after 17 years of helping companies navigate digital transformation, I’ve noticed something more profound happening.
item.dc:creator: Brad Weber, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI releases o1 LLM, unveils ChatGPT Pro
item.description: OpenAI has officially released its OpenAI o1 large language model (LLM), built for complex reasoning. The company also introduced ChatGPT Pro, a $200 monthly plan that includes unlimited access to OpenAI o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and advanced voice conversations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple is about to add seriously useful tools to Apple Intelligence
item.description: Apple is close to introducing iOS 18.2, a major update that brings significant additions to Apple Intelligence, its suite of generative AI (genAI) tools. Highlights of this AI-tinged release include the integration of Siri with ChatGPT, along with new writing and imaging tools.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ultimate guide to ChatGPT, Gemini, Llama, and other genAI chatbots you need right now
item.description: Since OpenAI first released ChatGPT to the public in November 2022, there has been a proliferation of consumer-facing chatbots in the large language model (LLM) race, changing how consumers interact with information. Chatbots are the interface we use to interact with LLMs.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: What is TypeScript? Strongly typed JavaScript
item.description: Originally developed by Microsoft as a way to adapt JavaScript as a tool to build enterprise-scale applications, TypeScript has become a widely popular programming language that combines JavaScript syntax with strong typing and object-oriented programming.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Michigan Democrats move to protect reproductive health data before GOP takes control of House
item.description: Democrats in Michigan are pressing to pass reproductive health care legislation before the party loses its majority with the new legislative session next year.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Volmert, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Telework, IT modernization emerge as early DOGE targets
item.description: The plans for DOGE continue to evolve, but some early themes are emerging as lawmakers start to weigh in with their own ideas. The post Telework, IT modernization emerge as early DOGE targets first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: How the world can tackle the power demands of artificial intelligence
item.description: The world must reshape its technology infrastructure to ensure artificial intelligence makes good on its potential as a transformative moment in digital innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Quake prompts brief tsunami warning on the West Coast. Here's what to know about tsunamis
item.description: The powerful earthquake that struck in Northern California on Thursday prompted a brief tsunami warning affecting about 5 million people along a stretch of the West Coast — from Northern California to Oregon — before being canceled.
item.dc:creator: Mark Thiessen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Google introduces PaliGemma 2 vision-language AI models
item.description: Google has introduced a new family of PaliGemma vision-language models, offering scalable performance, long captioning, and support for specialized tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google DeepMind and World Labs unveil AI tools to create 3D spaces from simple prompts
item.description: Google DeepMind and startup World Labs this week both revealed previews of AI tools that can be used to create immersive 3D environments from simple prompts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft: TPM 2.0 is a ‘non-negotiable’ requirement for Windows 11
item.description: With Windows 10 end of support on the horizon, Microsoft said its Trusted Platform Module (TPM) 2.0 requirement for PCs is a “non-negotiable standard” for upgrading to Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on Android
item.description: If unwanted text messages are piling up in your Android inbox, there are some easy steps you can take to clean things up and keep them organized.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Alleged Chinese cyberattack: FBI urges encrypted apps
item.description: Salt Typhoon, a Chinese government-linked hacking group, is one of the largest intelligence breaches in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation

item.title: US officials tout encryption apps amid Salt Typhoon cyberattack
item.description: Federal officials are calling on telecommunication companies to boost national security by using encrypted messaging apps following an unprecedented Chinese hacking campaign against more than half a dozen telecom firms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI catches cancer that mammogram misses
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4
